title: Be With You
tmdbOverview: Along with his young son, Ji-ho, Woo-jin misses his wife Soo-a, who died after promising to return a year later with the rainy season. Miraculously, they reunite with Soo-a when the rainy season comes around, but she has no memory of her husband and son whom she dearly loved.
synopsis: Be With You is a 2018 romance, drama and fantasy film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.7 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a IIA certification (HK rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
